title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 14–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Gerd, Children, Usopp, Robin, Jinbe as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The blaze in Branch 8's forest No. 2...

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: The kids just missed the flame,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Here's to the Guardian's of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Glad the likes are okay though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was so cool, jinbe! So freakin' cool!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: The guys at school may hate me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But I still consider them my friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, not all the children were in school...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
